info.title: HU Validation Service (S/4 Handling Unit)
info.description: Validates a Handling Unit in S/4 and retrieves its item-level data (Material, Batch, Quantity) needed for label generation. Wraps the standard SAP API_HANDLINGUNIT OData service, /HandlingUnitItem entity.

servers.description: S/4 OData service (actual host/port supplied via Destination)

get.summary: Validate an HU and retrieve its item data
get.description: Given an HU number and Warehouse number, returns the item-level data for that Handling Unit, including Material, Batch, and Quantity. If the HU does not exist, the response 'value' array will be empty.

parameters.name: HandlingUnitExternalID
parameters.description: The Handling Unit number to validate. This value is used to build the $filter sent to S/4 (HandlingUnitExternalID eq '<value>').

parameters.name: Warehouse
parameters.description: The Warehouse number the HU belongs to. This value is used to build the $filter sent to S/4 (Warehouse eq '<value>').

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: Filter items by property values, see OData Filtering. For this action, always construct as: HandlingUnitExternalID eq '<HandlingUnitExternalID>' and Warehouse eq '<Warehouse>'

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Show only the first n items, see Paging - Top

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Skip the first n items, see Paging - Skip

parameters.name: $count
parameters.description: Include count of items, see Count

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Select properties to be returned, see Select. Recommended: HandlingUnitExternalID,Warehouse,Material,Batch,HandlingUnitQuantity,Plant,StorageLocation

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Order items by property values, see Sorting

value.description: Empty array means the HU/Warehouse combination was not found (invalid HU)

HandlingUnitExternalID.description: HU number (also used as SSCC for Label B)

Material.description: Material number (used as 'content' for Label B)

Batch.description: Batch number (used as 'batchNo' for Label B)

HandlingUnitQuantity.description: Quantity packed in the HU (used as 'count' for Label B)
